hero.subtitle: At Rijschool Lovanium in Leuven, experienced instructors guide you step by step. Personal, patient, and at your own pace.

testimonials.name: Tibeau Reynaerts
testimonials.text: Gert immediately created a stress-free environment. Thanks to his approach I passed my driving exam. Absolutely recommended!

testimonials.name: Hanna Myklebust
testimonials.text: I learned a lot from the very first lesson. The stress literally fell off my shoulders. Flexible scheduling is a great plus.

testimonials.name: Pauline Marbaix
testimonials.text: The positive feedback approach and insights into road safety and car mechanics make Rijschool Lovanium unique. Great experience!

testimonials.name: Noémie Kamdem
testimonials.text: Thanks to the calm approach and efficient planning by email, I felt comfortable right away. Passed on the first attempt!

testimonials.name: Adinda Van Bé
testimonials.text: At Lovanium they are super friendly, they put you at ease and we don't only drive in Leuven but also on the motorway. Super!

testimonials.name: Si-Yuan Shen
testimonials.text: Gert and Hugo are both really great driving instructors. They are professional and give really good cues to teach me how to drive correctly and safely.

testimonials.name: Steffi Mercie
testimonials.text: Gert is a very calm and structured driving instructor. He gives clear explanations and helps you step by step. Very satisfied!

services.headline: Everything for your category B license
services.subtitle: From the first traffic rule to the driving exam — we guide you through every part of your training.

items.title: Theory Course
items.description: Pass your theory exam on the first try. Our 12-hour interactive course fully prepares you for the official traffic exam in Leuven.

items.title: Driving Lessons
items.description: Get safely on the road with an experienced instructor. Drive in a modern Audi with dual controls — manual or automatic transmission.

items.title: Refresher Session
items.description: Already licensed but want to refresh your skills? Our refresher session is ideal for new drivers who want to build confidence.

whyUs.headline: What makes us different
whyUs.subtitle: More than a driving school. We invest in your success — with specializations you won't find anywhere else.

items.title: Central in Leuven
items.description: Located in the Regus business center at Martelarenplein 20E — next to the train station, bus stops and kiss & ride zone.

items.title: Driving anxiety specialist
items.description: Our instructors are specialized in guiding students with driving anxiety, ADHD, ADD and learning disabilities.

items.title: Premium Audi fleet
items.description: Drive in a modern Audi with the latest safety technology. Both manual and automatic transmissions available.

items.title: Government accredited
items.description: Rijschool Lovanium is accredited by the Federal Government with recognition number 2863. Fully certified instructors.

items.title: Short waiting times
items.description: No months of waiting. We schedule your lessons quickly so you can start as soon as possible.

items.title: Available via WhatsApp
items.description: Easy contact via WhatsApp at +32 492 48 28 53. Quick responses, personal service.

pricing.subtitle: All prices include VAT. Transparent and fair.
pricing.note: All prices include VAT. Registration fee (€35) is one-time only. Exam fees charged by the exam center are not included.

members.name: Ludo

howItWorks.headline: From zero to license in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: We guide you through every part. Clear, personal and at your own pace.

steps.title: Enroll
steps.description: Send us a message via the form or WhatsApp. We schedule a free intake conversation and set up your driving file.

steps.title: Theory course
steps.description: Follow our 12h theory course and learn all traffic rules. Students who take theory pass much more often on the first attempt.

steps.title: Driving lessons
steps.description: Drive a modern Audi with a certified instructor. We drive in Leuven, on the ring road and on the motorway.

steps.title: Driving exam & license
steps.description: When you're ready, we register you for the exam. We prepare you optimally so you go to the exam center with confidence.
steps.detail: We accompany you to the end

faq.headline: Everything you want to know
faq.subtitle: Question not listed? Send us a message via WhatsApp.

items.question: How long does it take to get my driver's license?
items.answer: This varies greatly per person. On average it takes 3 to 6 months, but we fully adapt to your pace. Those who practice regularly pass faster. We schedule lessons as flexibly as possible.

items.question: Can I take driving lessons in an automatic car?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! We have both manual and automatic Audi training vehicles available. Both options are available for the same rate of €85/hour. Some students choose automatic to focus more quickly on the driving itself.

items.question: What does the driving exam itself cost?
items.answer: The theoretical exam costs approximately €24 and the practical exam approximately €108. These costs are charged by the exam center and are not included in our rates. We will help you with registration.

items.question: How quickly can I start lessons?
items.answer: Thanks to our short waiting times, you can often start within the week. Contact us via WhatsApp at +32 492 48 28 53 and we will check availability together.

items.question: Do I need to take theory before I can start driving lessons?
items.answer: Not required, but strongly recommended. Students who follow our 12h theory course before practical lessons understand traffic better and pass the theory exam much more often on the first attempt.

items.question: What if I don't pass my driving exam?
items.answer: Don't worry! We discuss together what can be improved and plan targeted additional lessons. You can repeat the exam as many times as needed. We won't let you go until you've passed.

items.question: Are you specialized in driving anxiety or ADHD?
items.answer: Yes! All our instructors are specially trained in guiding students with driving anxiety, ADHD, ADD and learning disabilities. We work in a calm, structured environment without stress.

items.question: How do I reach your location?
items.answer: We are located in the Regus business center at Martelarenplein 20E, 3000 Leuven — right next to the train station. Accessible by train, tram, bus and there is a kiss & ride zone. Ideally located for students from the entire Leuven region.

items.question: Can I combine lessons with school or work?
items.answer: Absolutely. We schedule lessons 7 days a week, from early morning to late evening. Whether you are a student, work shifts or have a busy schedule — we will always find a time that works for you.

items.question: What is the difference between a driving school route and a free license (VR)?
items.answer: With a driving school route you take your exams through us. You do not need supervised driving and can drive with an L-plate after 6 lessons. This is the fastest and most structured route to your license.

items.question: Can I take all my lessons with the same instructor?
items.answer: Yes, we always aim for that. Continuity is important for trust and progress. Upon registration we link you to a permanent instructor. Only in case of illness or leave do we temporarily switch.

items.question: What learning materials do I get for theory?
items.answer: You get access to our digital learning platform with practice questions, traffic signs and theory book. You can use this on your smartphone, tablet or laptop — convenient to practice anywhere.

items.question: Is there a minimum age to start?
items.answer: You can start theory lessons from age 16. Practical lessons normally start from age 17 (supervised driving) or 18 for the driving school route. We are happy to discuss options based on your age.

items.question: What if I want to cancel or reschedule a lesson?
items.answer: Lessons can be cancelled or rescheduled for free up to 24 hours in advance via WhatsApp. Cancellations less than 24 hours in advance will be charged. This keeps the schedule fair for everyone.

pakkettenBanner.headline: Choose the package that suits you

pakketten.intro: At Rijschool Lovanium you enjoy quality training where, in addition to driving technique, attention is also paid to traffic insight, the environment and the right attitude in traffic. Choose a package as preparation or supplement to your training, or choose the Master Package (20h) to practice without a supervisor.
pakketten.packageNote: All prices include VAT · €85/hour · Registration fee (€35) is one-time and not included
pakketten.ctaSubtitle: Enroll today and start your driving lessons within a week.

services.title: Mandatory driving lessons
services.description: If you have failed the driving exam twice, you are required to take driving lessons. Our instructors ensure you learn to drive with the correct techniques and make the right choices in traffic so you quickly get your permanent license!

services.title: Mock exam
services.badge: At least 1 month before your exam
services.description: During this lesson our instructors scan your driving style and check whether you are ready for the practical exam. Thanks to their feedback and tips you are optimally prepared. Plan a mock exam at least a month before your practical exam.

services.title: Exam with training vehicle
services.description: You can choose to take the practical exam with our training vehicle and your instructor as supervisor. This is only possible if you have previously taken at least 6 hours of lessons with our vehicle.
included: Lesson just before the practical exam (1h)

services.title: Expired provisional license
services.description: Has your provisional license expired? Then you are required by law to take 6 hours of driving lessons. Make sure you take your lessons AFTER your provisional license has expired. Afterwards you can apply for a new provisional license (12-month model) valid for 1 year.

services.title: Individual lesson
services.description: Do you want to finally master all parking maneuvers, or would you prefer to hit the motorway for the first time with an experienced instructor beside you? Choose an individual lesson and practice specifically what you want.

footer.description: Accredited driving school in Leuven (license #2863). Theory lessons, driving lessons and refresher sessions. Specialized in driving anxiety, ADHD and learning disabilities.
footer.recognition: Accredited by the Federal Government · Recognition number 2863
